overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a futuristic suit exploring a dark industrial spaceship interior. The character moves through a locker room into narrow corridors with shifting emergency lighting, creating a tense sci-fi horror atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: locker room with metal storage lockers and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the locker room toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: tall dark metal storage lockers lining both walls
long white bench with folded towels stacked on top
rectangular overhead light panels emitting white light
open doorway leading to the main corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a utilitarian locker room with metal lockers on both sides and white benches in the center. The space is illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights as the character moves toward the exit doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: utility corridor with multiple access doors

events.description: exits locker room and enters the main ship corridor
ambient lighting shifts from bright white to dimmer yellow tone

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrow corridor passing utility doors on both sides

entered.detail: metal paneled walls with visible piping and conduits
metal access doors with warning labels and control panels
red safety lines marking the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The character exits the locker room into a narrow industrial corridor lined with metal walls and utility doors. Red safety stripes mark the floor as the lighting shifts to a dimmer yellow hue.

scene_state.functional_zone: emergency-lit corridor with red alarm lighting

events.description: corridor lighting switches to dark red emergency mode
character reaches the dark end of the corridor and turns around

agents.ego_description: cautiously advancing through the dark red-lit corridor toward the shadowy end

entered.detail: pulsing red alarm lights casting ominous red glow on walls
hazard warning signs mounted on door frames

segments.scene_description: The corridor becomes increasingly dark as red emergency lights take over, creating a tense atmosphere. The character continues to the dark end of the hallway before turning around to head back.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridor with equipment stations and labeled access doors

events.description: character completes 180 degree turn and begins walking back through the corridor
passing through area with scattered equipment crates and wall terminals

agents.ego_description: turning around and exploring the corridor, examining equipment and side passages while moving toward a red-lit doorway

entered.detail: stacked cargo containers and maintenance boxes along the wall
illuminated control panel with blue screen display
access doors marked L3 and L5 with digital status displays
heavy industrial door bathed in intense red warning light

segments.scene_description: After turning around, the character explores the return path through mixed lighting conditions, passing equipment crates and wall terminals. The character approaches a heavy door marked with levels L3 and L5, ending at a doorway with intense red lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial facility that gradually descends into a dark, alarm-lit corridor. It begins in a utilitarian locker room with white benches and bright fluorescent lighting as the character moves toward a distant exit. As the character passes through the doorway, the environment shifts into a narrow industrial corridor where the light dims to a yellow hue and red safety stripes appear on the floor. The scene then grows increasingly oppressive as the yellow light fades into pulsing red emergency lighting, leading the character to the dark end of the hallway before they turn back. Finally, the camera tracks the return path past equipment crates and wall terminals, concluding at a heavy door marked L3 and L5 under an intense red glow.
